mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO forum_post_like (post_id, volunteer_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{volunteerId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM forum_post_like WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM forum_post_like WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM forum_post_like WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}
